step_rationale: Transporter of acylcarnitines in cardiomyocyte; MI susceptibility locus.
mechanism: SLC22A2 genetic variation modulates cardiomyocyte acylcarnitine uptake and reperfusion-injury sensitivity.

references.title: Shared Genetic Liability Between Heart Failure and Myocardial Infarction Revealed by Genome-Wide Cross-Trait Analysis.
references.journal: Journal of cardiovascular pharmacology and therapeutics

references.title: Targeting long-chain acylcarnitine accumulation to protect cardiac mitochondrial homeostasis after complete revascularization.
